default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO improvements, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team introduced new members Maia and Vivek, who will be focusing on content and SEO work for Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Teams discussed strategies for refreshing and redirecting outdated content, with a focus on maintaining SEO value](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Plans to improve comparison pages by adding more content-rich, keyword-dense sections above existing tables](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Ongoing work on image integration, FAQ sections, and providing access to a Looker dashboard for prompt tracking](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Maia: New director at GrowthX, background in journalism and B2B marketing](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Vivek: Joined GrowthX in December, experienced in content marketing for technical niches](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

### Traffic and Content Performance

  - [Strapi's content is trending in the right direction for clicks and page views](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Listicles and AI-related content are performing well](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Overall traffic is flat, with some decline in Google traffic offset by AI engine traffic](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

### Content Refresh and Redirect Strategy

  - [Two main focus areas: legitimate content to redirect/refresh and refresh opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [60 URLs identified for potential refresh or redirect](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Discussion on when to refresh vs. redirect, especially for version-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Agreement to go case-by-case for high-traffic pages](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Plan to use docs to ground updated content and potentially use AI for less critical updates](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### Sitemap and Duplicate Content Issues

  - [Identified issues with trailing slashes creating duplicate content](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Some URLs in sitemap are deleted or already redirecting](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide a list of changes, Strapi team (possibly with Notoom) to implement](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)

### Ongoing Content Production

  - [20 articles in progress this week](https://fathom.video/share/9xoffZcYsVz9TuMH4QXX1NKab8xgVWeA?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
